title: rubus koehleri
intro: Rubus koehleri, also known as Koehle's black raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Rubus, which is native to parts of China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus koehleri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the prevention of certain cancers. Rubus koehleri can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
